data.description: WH Press Sec. Leavitt: Trump order today will have logistics on tariffs.
White House Spokeswoman Karoline Leavitt Announced President Trump Will Sign An Executive Order On Trade Today, Officially Moving The Reciprocal Tariff Deadline From July 9 To August 1.

data.title: New whales spark Bitcoin's 3rd profit-selling wave, marking a major distribution event in this bull run, per CryptoQuant.
data.description: The latest market movement in the cryptocurrency space has seen a significant amount of profit being taken by new Bitcoin investors, known as whales. This marks the third major instance of distribution during the current upward trend. The data comes from CryptoQuant and highlights the impact of these new players on the market.

data.title: Meridian and Centene Foundation donate $1 million grant to Food Bank Council of Michigan for fresh food access in southwest MI.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Detroit, a collaboration was announced between Meridian Health Plan of Michigan, Inc. and the Centene Foundation. The objective is to increase availability of fresh produce and improve health results in underserved rural areas in southwest Michigan known as food deserts. Meridian, a prominent managed care organization in Michigan, is joining forces with the Centene Foundation to address this issue and make a positive impact. This partnership aims to benefit the communities by providing access to nutritious food options, which can ultimately enhance the well-being of residents in these areas. The initiative is expected to reach a substantial number of individuals living in food deserts in rural southwest Michigan.

data.title: Global Trading Card Games Market to reach $11.8B by 2030, with CAGR of 7.4% from 2024-2029. Growing due to innovation and digital enhancements, with factors like new card releases, high prices for advanced packs, broad age appeal, digital integration, expansion into emerging markets, and development of e-sports.
data.description: The global trading card games market is projected to reach $11.8 billion by 2030, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.4% for 2024-2029, as per a study by BCC Research. The report examines market channels including hobby stores and online platforms, game genres, and accessories influencing consumer behavior. It delves into regional insights, market drivers, challenges, and major companies in the TCG industry. Key growth factors include frequent new card releases, premium pricing of advanced packs, diverse game types appealing across age groups, digital integration, expansion into emerging markets, and the rise of e-sports and competitive play. This growth is driven by innovation and increasing consumer interest, emphasizing the need for stakeholders to stay informed to exploit emerging opportunities and maintain competitiveness.

Google States That Protecting Users and Developers Is Their Main Focus in Response to Epic Games Lawsuit and Will Continue Their Appeal. They Claim the Court Ruling Will Seriously Damage User Safety, Reduce Options, and Hurt Innovation.

data.title: Baxter's stock plunges 19.4% to $22.66 after trimming annual outlook. Q2 EPS at 59 cents, sales reach $2.81 billion.
data.description: Baxter International Inc. (NYSE: BAX) saw a significant decrease of 19.4% to $22.66 per share on Thursday. By 11 a.m. EST, the medical device company's shares were trading at $21.68, close to its 52-week low. In the second quarter, Baxter reported an adjusted EPS of 59 cents, meeting the management's guidance range of 59-63 cents and the Wall Street estimate of 61 cents. The company recorded sales of $2.81 billion, marking a 4% increase year over year on a reported basis and a 1% increase on an operational basis, which closely aligned with the anticipated $2.82 billion consensus. Management had expected a 4%-5% growth in sales for the second quarter on a reported basis and a 1%-2% growth on an operational basis. Sales figures for Medical Products & Therapies were stagnant compared to the previous year, standing at $1.32 billion (or +1% on a constant currency basis) in the quarter. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Vertiv Holdings beats Q2 earnings with 95 cents per share, $2.64 billion sales. Raises FY25 guidance to $3.75-$3.85 EPS, $9.925-$10.075 billion sales.
data.description: Vertiv Holdings Co (NYSE: VRT ) exceeded expectations with its second-quarter results and raised its FY25 guidance. The company's quarterly earnings stood at 95 cents per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of 83 cents per share. Additionally, Vertiv reported quarterly sales of $2.64 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus of $2.35 billion. The updated guidance for FY2025 includes an adjusted EPS range raised from $3.45-$3.65 to $3.75-$3.85 and a sales range boosted from $9.325 billion-$9.575 billion to $9.925 billion-$10.075 billion. Giordano Albertazzi, the company's representative, highlighted the second quarter's strong performance as indicative of Vertiv's market strength and operational efficiency.

data.title: Atlanta welcomes Trua Senior Living Locators franchise, helping seniors find compassionate care. New franchise owners: sisters Blankenship and Finks.
data.description: Trua, a company that assists families in locating the perfect senior living arrangements for their relatives, has initiated operations in Atlanta, Georgia, as announced on July 31, 2025. The franchise is now under the ownership of siblings Lauren Blankenship and Epris Finks, who are proud Atlanta residents. This new venture aims to cater to the growing demand for senior care services in the region and address the needs of families looking for suitable living options for their elderly loved ones.

data.title: GEA raises FY2025 forecast: Organic sales growth now 2-4%, EBITDA margin 16.2-16.4%, ROCE 34-38% - all higher than previous.
data.description: GEA Group Aktiengesellschaft in Duesseldorf, Germany has reported a very positive operating performance in the first half of the year 2025. Due to this, they are increasing their guidance parameters based on preliminary figures. The new guidance includes organic sales growth of 2 to 4 percent, up from the previous range of 1 to 4 percent. The EBITDA-margin before restructuring expenses is now expected to be between 16.2 to 16.4 percent, an increase from the previous range of 15.6 to 16.0 percent. Additionally, the ROCE is anticipated to be between 34 to 38 percent, up from the previous range of 30 to 35 percent.

data.title: SEC Chair Paul Atkins launches Project Crypto, authorizing ICOs, airdrops, and more. Also, new pathways for DeFi platforms and crypto contracts.
data.description: In addition to this, the Securities and Exchange Commission intends to introduce fresh avenues for registration for Decentralized Finance (DeFi) platforms. They also aim to permit specific cryptocurrency investment contracts to be traded on exchanges that are not subject to regulation.

data.title: Copia Automation report shows $4.29M/hour downtime cost for C-Suite, highlighting strategic blind spots.
data.description: A significant gap in evaluating risk creates strategic vulnerabilities for companies, exposing them to potential threats. On July 30, 2025, in New York, Copia Automation, a prominent company in Industrial Code Lifecycle Management (ICLM), announced the release of its 2nd important report.

data.title: BeatBox introduces new flavor Mystic Grape, expanding its portfolio; launching nationwide on August 1.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on July 31, 2025, a popular ready-to-drink brand in the U.S., BeatBox, revealed its plans for growth by introducing a new flavor, Mystic Grape. This expansion of their flavor options marks a significant move for the company. The product is set to be available across the country starting from August 1. BeatBox, known for its rapid rise in the market, is expected to capture even more consumer interest with this latest addition to its lineup.
